Average value for 3 methods - see Subent 013 .
I. In 0.02 -10 eV the total and scattering CSs were
measured as function of energy by TOF; He counters
SNM-17 in 4PI geometry were used, V,C,Pb samples were
used for normalization; difference of these CSs was
fitted by 1/sqrt(En) by least squares method and rad.
II. Rad.capture CS energy dependence was measured by:
- NaI(Tl) detector with low threshold 2.3 MeV ,
- Ge(Li) detector with window within 1230-keV line.
III. Capture CS was determined from gamma-ray spectra
for Sn-177(this woark) and for natural Sn (REL-REFs of
V.J.Orphan+ and L.V.Groshev) with normalization to
Sn-natural capture CS = 0.63+-0.01 b of S.F.Mughabghab
